2026-05-26ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActAppointment of a part-time member of the Social Security TribunalAppointment of Charlotte Anne McQuade of Stouffville, Ontario, to be a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective September 1, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Appointment of a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal
precis: Appointment of Charlotte Anne McQuade of Stouffville, Ontario, to be a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective September 1, 2026.
